subject: [PATCH v1 5/9] fuse: refactor setting up copy state for payload copying

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch refactors the code for setting up copy state in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) driver, specifically for payload copying. A new helper function `setup_fuse_copy_state()` is introduced to encapsulate this logic, making it more modular and easier to maintain. The existing code is simplified by removing duplicated functionality and replacing it with calls to this new function.
